original_statement: which year was her best year in terms of number of awards won?
mutated_statement: which year was the subject's best year in terms of both maximizing and minimizing awards won?
mutation_analysis: Pronoun generalization + Contradictory quantifier insertion: "her" → "the subject's" (personal pronoun → generic possessive noun phrase) | inserted "both maximizing and minimizing" introducing semantic contradiction/ambiguity (number of awards won → both maximizing and minimizing awards won)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 无法意识到指令矛盾（形式化执行而非语义澄清）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的陈述：“The question seeks the years with the maximum and minimum number of awards won...”以及agent返回的预测"2008|2007"可见，agent直接按计数规则统计每年“won”次数并给出最大年和最小年。整个过程中未指出“both maximizing and minimizing”构成语义矛盾，也未请求澄清或尝试修正问题。该行为属于机械性按可行子集执行指令并产出结果，符合“形式化执行而非语义澄清”的定义，因此归类为无法意识到指令矛盾。
